summary: Initial read-only scan of source_html to identify available files and prepare a basic archive summary
assumptions: source_html is a local snapshot, not a live production workspace.
The current contents represent the available archive for this first pass.
risks: Metadata extraction is incomplete when files are non-HTML or missing titles.
File quality may be mixed once real archive content is added.
open_questions: Should medication names be extracted in the next pass?
Should build object terms be extracted in the next pass?
